400.description: Bad request response from numbers add.

409.description: One or more numbers could not be added

post.description: Assigns telephone numbers to the account. Account balance must cover the monthly DID rate multiplied by the number of DIDs being added.

400.description: Bad request response from numbers cnam.

409.description: One or more CNAM settings could not be updated

post.description: Enables or disables inbound Caller ID Name (CNAM) lookup for one or more numbers.

requestBody.description: Body for enable or disable inbound cnam.

400.description: Bad request response from numbers disconnect.

409.description: One or more numbers could not be disconnected

post.description: Removes numbers from the account and returns them to the available pool. Numbers currently porting cannot be disconnected.

401.description: Unauthorized response from numbers forward remove.

400.description: Bad request response from numbers forward remove.

409.description: One or more forwards could not be removed

delete.description: Removes call forwarding from one or more numbers.

401.description: Unauthorized response from numbers forward set.

400.description: Bad request response from numbers forward set.

409.description: One or more forwards could not be set

post.description: Enables call forwarding on one or more numbers to a destination number.

post.summary: Set LIDB / Outbound Caller ID Name

400.description: Bad request response from numbers lidb.

409.description: One or more LIDB updates could not be completed

post.description: Sets the outbound Caller ID Name (CNAM/LIDB) for one or more numbers. Updates the database and the routing network. The number must be on the account.

requestBody.description: Body for set lidb / outbound caller id name.

400.description: Bad request response from numbers list.

post.description: Returns telephone numbers on the account with their route and gateway IP. Optionally filter by route ID or number.

400.description: Bad request response from numbers move.

409.description: One or more numbers could not be moved

post.description: Moves one or more numbers to a different account with a specified route.

400.description: Bad request response from numbers remove.

409.description: One or more numbers could not be removed

post.description: Deletes numbers from the account entirely. Numbers currently porting cannot be removed.

400.description: Bad request response from numbers route.

409.description: One or more routes could not be set

post.description: Sets the gateway route for one or more numbers.

400.description: Bad request response from numbers translations.

409.description: One or more translations could not be set

post.description: Sets the inbound DNIS translation for one or more numbers.

ip.description: Gateway IP:port or system route name (T30, VOICE_BRIDGE, T38, RTC_BRIDGE).

numbersAddResponse.description: Response wrapper for the numbers add operation.

numbersForwardDeleteRequest.description: Request body for the numbers forward delete operation.

numberTranslationFailEntry.description: A single number translation fail row.

numbersRouteConflictResponse.description: Response wrapper for the numbers route conflict operation.

numbersCnamResponse.description: Response wrapper for the numbers cnam operation.

cnam.description: Inbound CNAM lookup status as uppercase string.

numbersRouteRequest.description: Request body for the numbers route operation.

numbersAddConflictResponse.description: Response wrapper for the numbers add conflict operation.

numberAddFailEntry.description: A single number add fail row.

numberMoveFailEntry.description: A single number move fail row.

numbersArrayRequest.description: Request body for the numbers array operation.

numbersLidbRequest.description: Request body for the numbers lidb operation.

cnam.description: Outbound caller name. Max 15 characters, alphanumeric and spaces only.

customerOrderReference.description: Optional order reference. Auto-generated if omitted.

numbersCnamConflictResponse.description: Response wrapper for the numbers cnam conflict operation.

numbersListRequest.description: Request body for the numbers list operation.

numbersTranslationsRequest.description: Request body for the numbers translations operation.

translation.description: DNIS translation value. Digits and # only.

success.description: 'Remote database updated' when carrier submission succeeded; 'Local database updated' when only the local cache was updated.

numbersRemovedResponse.description: Response wrapper for the numbers removed operation.

numbersMoveResponse.description: Response wrapper for the numbers move operation.

numbersForwardConflictResponse.description: Note: response keys are 'foward_success' and 'foward_failed' — these are the key names as returned by the API.

numbersMoveRequest.description: Request body for the numbers move operation.

route.description: Gateway route ID on the destination account.

numberRouteFailEntry.description: A single number route fail row.

numberCnamFailEntry.description: A single number cnam fail row.

numberForwardFailEntry.description: A single number forward fail row.

numbersRouteResponse.description: Response wrapper for the numbers route operation.

numbersListResponse.description: Response wrapper for the numbers list operation.

numbersMoveConflictResponse.description: Response wrapper for the numbers move conflict operation.

numbersForwardResponse.description: Note: response key is 'foward' (not 'forward') — this is the key name as returned by the API (schema numbersForwardResponse).

numbersLidbConflictResponse.description: Response wrapper for the numbers lidb conflict operation.

numbers.description: Note: 404 uses 'numbers' key (not 'message') for the error value.

numbersAddRequest.description: Request body for the numbers add operation.

route.description: Gateway route ID. Defaults to 4 (DID) if omitted or invalid.

numberLidbFailEntry.description: A single number lidb fail row.

errorResponse.description: Response wrapper for the error operation.

numbersForwardDeleteResponse.description: Note: response key is 'foward' (not 'forward') — this is the key name as returned by the API (schema numbersForwardDeleteResponse).

numbersLidbResponse.description: Response wrapper for the numbers lidb operation.

numbersRemoveConflictResponse.description: Response wrapper for the numbers remove conflict operation.

numbersTranslationsResponse.description: Response wrapper for the numbers translations operation.

numbersCnamRequest.description: Request body for the numbers cnam operation.

cnam.description: true to enable inbound CNAM lookup, false to disable.

numberForwardRemovedEntry.description: A single number forward removed row.

numberRemoveErrorEntry.description: A single number remove error row.

reason.example: Special Status: The number is currently porting.
reason.description: Present when the number could not be removed due to an active port.

numbersTranslationsConflictResponse.description: Response wrapper for the numbers translations conflict operation.

numbersForwardRequest.description: Request body for the numbers forward operation.
